'''Korvit Domesa''' was the Drama Editor for [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] shortly before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Among the plays Korvit reviewed was ''[[The Trickery of Vosdia Nooma]]'', which was produced by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Onaconda Farr/Legends|Onaconda Farr]].

*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|life/13418_2.html|Rodian Campaigning Mixes Drama & Politics}} {{1st}}
